description_long: This is a modern football with a matte black surface and a pentagon-hexagon panel pattern. The front features gold branding with the words 'CLEAR MEN' and a motivational quote in gold text. The ball's surface appears slightly textured, providing grip, and the seams between panels are visible but not pronounced, suggesting a high-quality finish. The overall shape is perfectly spherical, and the ball looks new with no visible scuffs or wear. The branding and text are the only visible markings, with the rest of the ball being a uniform black.
description: A matte black football with gold 'CLEAR MEN' branding and a motivational quote, featuring a classic pentagon-hexagon panel pattern and a slightly textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing gold 'CLEAR MEN' branding and a motivational quote on a matte black surface.
description_view_1: Rear view with no visible branding or text, only the black panel pattern is visible.
description_view_2: Side view showing the black panel pattern with no visible text or logos.
description_view_3: Another side view with the black panel pattern, with a hint of gold text barely visible at the edge.
